title: Fancy Stands - Sapixcraft add-on
description: 🔶 8 fancy armor stand model variants (with arms!) - by renaming in an anvil | available in 16x→ 512x
body:
# Want your armor stands to actually look good?

This add-on gives armor stands a proper makeover — 8 custom 3D styles that match Sapixcraft's cartoony aesthetic, unlocked just by renaming them in an anvil no commands needed

## 🎨 8 styles to choose from:

**normal · oak · pale oak · spruce · mangrove · jungle · birch · stone**

Each style also has an **arms variant** → just add `arms` to the end of the name.

![Fancy stands Sapixcraft add-on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69aa87b81c5260ba50539c52a86b93994f3edd1a.png)
![Fancy stands full lineup — Sapixcraft add-on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d33a1f545263535194ecada86fe2dbc5a21ab23.png)

## 📦 Resolutions

| Resolution | Download |
|---|---|
| 32× | ✅ Available here |
| 16× | ✅ Available here |
| 64× | [sapixcraft.com](https://sapixcraft.com/downloads/addons/fancystands) |
| 128× | [sapixcraft.com](https://sapixcraft.com/downloads/addons/fancystands) |
| 256× | [sapixcraft.com](https://sapixcraft.com/downloads/addons/fancystands) |
| 512× | [sapixcraft.com](https://sapixcraft.com/downloads/addons/fancystands) |

All resolutions are **free** → higher resolutions are available on **[sapixcraft.com](https://sapixcraft.com/downloads/addons/fancystands)**.

---
---

## ❔ How to use

1. Install **Fancy Stands** above Sapixcraft in your load order
2. Install **EMF & ETF** or **OptiFine** for 3D in-world models ⚠️
3. Rename an armor stand in an anvil — e.g. `Oak`, `Stone Arms`, `Mangrove`
4. Place the stand — done!

> Item & inventory models work on **1.21+ without any mods**.
> 3D in-world models require **OptiFine** or **Iris + EMF/ETF**.

![Fancy stands dropped item models — Sapixcraft add-on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0206cb34a5135b3b04d8b740b71752b013ce3894.png)
![Fancy stands in a build — Sapixcraft add-on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b32ad59573ce225cf4c3b45b7b2c41288720dd2.png)

This add-on is designed to use with [**Sapixcraft**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sapixcraft) — it works standalone, but is recommended to use alongside Sapixcraft.

---
---
